question: Benny saw a 10-foot shark with 2 6-inch remoras attached to it. What percentage of the shark's body length is the combined length of the remoras?
Rania saw a 210-foot whale with 7 72-inch remoras attached to it. What percentage of the whale's body length is the combined length of the remoras?

Sanjay saw a 60-foot dolphin with 16 12-inch remoras attached to it. But a quarter of the remoras go away. What percentage of the dolphin's body length is the combined length of the remaining remoras?

A fog bank rolls in from the ocean to cover a city. It takes 10 minutes to cover every 3 miles of the city. If the city is 42 miles across from the oceanfront to the opposite inland edge, how many minutes will it take for the fog bank to cover the whole city?

A fog bank rolls in from the ocean to cover a city. It takes 50 minutes to cover every 77 miles of the city. If the city is 77 miles across from the oceanfront to the opposite inland edge, how many minutes will it take for the fog bank to cover the whole city?

A fog bank rolls in from the ocean to cover a city. It takes 64 minutes to cover every 2 miles of the city. If the city is 80 miles across from the oceanfront to the opposite inland edge, how many minutes will it take for the fog bank to cover a tenth of the city?

On a moonless night, three fireflies danced in the meadow. They were joined by four less than three times as many fireflies as were already in the meadow. Then, two thirds of the fireflies flew away. How many fireflies remained?

On a moonless night, seven fireflies danced in the meadow. They were joined by one less than four times as many fireflies as were already in the meadow. Then, two thirds of the fireflies flew away. How many fireflies remained?

On a moonless night, five fireflies danced in the meadow. They were joined by three less than three times as many fireflies as were already in the meadow. Then, half of the fireflies flew away. After that, 8 more fireflies flew away. How many fireflies remained?
A carpenter has a board that is 12 feet long. He needs to cut it into pieces that are 18 inches long. If he makes all the cuts, how many pieces will he have?
A carpenter has a board that is 15 feet long. He needs to cut it into pieces that are 9 inches long. If he makes all the cuts, how many pieces will he have?

A carpenter has a board that is 25 feet long. He needs to cut it into pieces that are 15 inches long. If he makes all the cuts, 4 of the pieces crack and cannot be used. How many usable pieces will he have?
Lena has 4 bags with 6 marbles in each bag. She buys 8 more marbles. Then she gives away half of all her marbles. How many marbles does Lena have left?
Lena has 9 bags with 7 marbles in each bag. She buys 21 more marbles. Then she gives away half of all her marbles. How many marbles does Lena have left?

Lena has 8 bags with 5 marbles in each bag. She buys 12 more marbles. Then she gives away half of all her marbles. After that, she finds 9 more marbles under the table. How many marbles does Lena have now?
A bakery makes 5 trays of muffins with 9 muffins on each tray. They sell 18 muffins in the morning and 7 in the afternoon. How many muffins remain?
A bakery makes 12 trays of muffins with 8 muffins on each tray. They sell 25 muffins in the morning and 19 in the afternoon. How many muffins remain?

A bakery makes 10 trays of muffins with 11 muffins on each tray. They sell 30 muffins in the morning and 15 in the afternoon. Then 6 muffins are dropped on the floor and thrown away. How many muffins remain?
Marco reads 12 pages a day for 5 days. Then he rereads 8 pages. How many pages did he read in total?
Marco reads 15 pages a day for 7 days. Then he rereads 14 pages. How many pages did he read in total?
Marco reads 20 pages a day for 4 days. Then he rereads 10 pages. After that, he skips 6 pages because they are missing. How many pages did he actually read?
A farmer plants 6 rows of carrots with 14 carrots in each row. Rabbits eat 18 carrots. How many carrots are left?
A farmer plants 9 rows of carrots with 17 carrots in each row. Rabbits eat 28 carrots. How many carrots are left?
A farmer plants 7 rows of carrots with 16 carrots in each row. Rabbits eat 24 carrots. Then 11 more carrots are harvested early. How many carrots remain in the ground?
Nina buys 3 packs of stickers with 11 stickers in each pack. Her friend gives her 9 more stickers. Then she uses 14 stickers in a notebook. How many stickers does she have left?
Nina buys 8 packs of stickers with 13 stickers in each pack. Her friend gives her 17 more stickers. Then she uses 26 stickers in a notebook. How many stickers does she have left?

Nina buys 5 packs of stickers with 12 stickers in each pack. Her friend gives her 15 more stickers. Then she uses 18 stickers in a notebook. After that, she loses 7 stickers. How many stickers does she have left?
A train travels 45 miles per hour for 3 hours. Then it travels 30 miles per hour for 2 more hours. How many miles does the train travel in total?
A train travels 55 miles per hour for 4 hours. Then it travels 35 miles per hour for 3 more hours. How many miles does the train travel in total?

A train travels 60 miles per hour for 2 hours. Then it travels 40 miles per hour for 5 more hours. After that, it must go back 30 miles due to a routing mistake. How many miles of net progress did the train make?
